mapper.select: select element_id as ELEMENT_ID, period_id as PERIOD_ID, dept_id as DEPT_ID, element_type_code as ELEMENT_TYPE_CODE, element_name as ELEMENT_NAME, max_score as MAX_SCORE, weight as WEIGHT, is_deleted as IS_DELETED, version as VERSION, created_at as CREATED_AT, created_by as CREATED_BY, updated_at as UPDATED_AT, updated_by as UPDATED_BY from evaluation_elements_51 where element_id = #{elementId} and is_deleted = 'n'
mapper.update: update evaluation_elements_51 set dept_id = #{deptId}, element_type_code = #{elementTypeCode}, element_name = #{elementName}, max_score = #{maxScore}, weight = #{weight}, version = #{version} + 1, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where element_id = #{elementId} and version = #{version} and is_deleted = 'n'
